Bash(cd "C:\\Users\\PC\\Documents\\taqon\\website" && python3 << 'PYEOF'
import re

with open\('src/data/solutionsData.js', 'r', encoding='utf-8'\) as f:
    content = f.read\(\)

# Remove all detailedContent template literal fields
content = re.sub\(r'    detailedContent: `[^`]*`,\\n', '', content\)

with open\('src/data/solutionsData.js', 'w', encoding='utf-8'\) as f:
    f.write\(content\)

print\('Done - removed all detailedContent fields'\)
PYEOF)

Bash(python3 -c "
import sys, io
sys.stdout = io.TextIOWrapper\(sys.stdout.buffer, encoding='utf-8', errors='replace'\)
import fitz
doc = fitz.open\('web development focus.pdf'\)
for page_num in range\(0, 24\):
    page = doc[page_num]
    text = page.get_text\(\)
    if 'appliance' in text.lower\(\) and \('PP' in text or 'EP' in text or 'power point' in text.lower\(\)\):
        print\(f'=== PAGE {page_num+1} ==='\)
        print\(text[:4000]\)
        print\(\)
" 2>&1)
